# FROZEN — do not hand-edit or casually regenerate. This file is the
# binding artifact for ports/pyl/CONTRACT.md §6: the Socrates port must
# reproduce every coefficient below to <=1e-12 relative, and CI checks
# every coefficient against real scipy to <=1e-9 relative (via
# check_sos_vs_scipy.py) so this dump cannot silently drift from the
# real library. Regenerated only by run_upstream.py, from the shim's
# own butter() implementation (CONTRACT.md steps 1-5) — one line per
# SOS section, `<design-id> b0 b1 b2 1 a1 a2`.
